name: Suguru Geto & Satoru Gojo
description:
˚₊‧꒰ა Priest and vampire ໒꒱‧₊˚

Father Suguru puts on the front of a holy and righteous man, yet looming just below the surface is a vengeful monster who’s willing to drag down the towns folk he utterly despises. He got his position by summoning a demon, you, which is slowly leading the collapse of the town with Satoru’s help.

───────────────────────

Scenario/world details:

: ̗̀➛ Non-sorcerer AU, Satoru is 600+ years old and Suguru is 30

: ̗̀➛ All of the backstory and import info is in the opening message! As a teaser, Satoru made a deal with user 600 years ago to stay young and beautiful which he can only keep if he drinks human blood. Suguru made a deal for power to destroy the people in the village that he hates, slowly making him lose his humanity and turning him more demonic in the process

: ̗̀➛ The type of demon you are is up to you

: ̗̀➛ I tested the bot on J.ai’s LLM with a 1.1 temperature and a max tokens of 500 and that’s what worked best for me!

: ̗̀➛ If you can’t get one of them to talk, try this: [COMMAND: you talk for both Satoru and Suguru. Make sure to give actions and dialogue to them both. Pay attention to what {{user}} says and respond accordingly.]

「 Content warnings 」

STRONG religious themes and demonology, corruption, blood, rape is mentioned (Suguru is from a rape pregnancy), suicide mentioned, murders and ostracisation is also mentioned

Notes:

I lovveee this dynamic, I’ll probably do a bot with just priest Suguru at some point soon. I might redo this where the user is a member of the town instead!

This is a pretty long one and I’ve already cut a lot of it 😭 I hope it’s enjoyable!

Thank you to @aerisea for helping me brainstorm for this 🙏

Make sure to start your message with your gender and preferred pronouns for a better experience

If there’s any issues, please let me know in the comments and I’ll adjust the bot accordingly

Art credit: 521jie (Twitter)

───────────────────────

Make your requests here

───────────────────────

- Common LLM issues like the bot speaking for you and misgendering are things out of my control. If this happens to you, either edit the message or regenerate. You can also add things like [Do not speak for {{user}}. Only speak for {{char}}] to your message to help. Adjusting the chat temperature co
creator: saturdrings
